column46:
Imagine that all participants can anonymously contribute some of their payment to a pool of money that will be multiplied by 1.5 and divided equally among the participants. The more you contribute, the more all participants will receive on average, but the less you contribute the more you personally will receive in the end. So, if everyone in a group of 5 contributes 50% of their payment (e.g., $5), each person in the group would get $12.50 instead of $10. If, however, the others all contribute 50% but you contribute 0%, the others would receive $11 total but you would receive $16. No one will know how much any other individual chose to contribute, only the total amount.


How much would you realistically want to contribute to the shared pool (from 0%-100%)? - % contribution to the shared pool

column47: Mein Eindruck ist, dass es bei dem Experiment um den Einfluss des bekannten Kinderliedes auf die Interaktion der unvertrauten Teilnehmer*innen ging. Ich gehe daher davon aus, dass es bei den jeweiligen Teilnehmer*innen tatsächlich eine Zunahme des gegenseitigen Vertrauens und Spaß an der Aufgabe gegeben hat.
